mentions.note: Government-backed rare earth materials play; traditionalist choice for mining and critical minerals exposure. Beat out Niakore which is too speculative.
Rare earth producer; caller owned since 2020; long-term growth potential given president's commitment to domestic critical minerals; not just spec play.
Fully integrated rare earth and magnet producer with DoD backing and US mines (California, Texas); critical materials at only $10B market cap; government floor supports valuation.
Preferred rare earth exposure over speculative Critical Metals; for real in rare earth sector.
Only rare earth name Cramer really blesses; government backing, solid management, performing well with government support.
Recommended rare earth materials supplier over USA Rare Earth; better positioned for supply chain.
